title: Agent Utils tool inventory
description: Concise inventory of the first-party surfaces and repo-local tools that agents and operators use around this repository.

publishing.githubPagesPath: Repository Settings → Pages → Deploy from branch: main, folder: /docs
publishing.localPreview: npm run docs:build && python3 -m http.server --directory docs 8000

sections.name: Cacophony first-party surfaces
sections.summary: Managed lifecycle, work tracking, validation, and operator coordination surfaces provided by caco.

tools.name: Beads
tools.purpose: Track tasks, bugs, epics, ownership, dependencies, and status.

tools.name: Agent lifecycle
tools.purpose: Report status, inspect diffs, reintegrate work, and complete or discard managed runs.

tools.name: Messaging and speech
tools.purpose: Read inboxes, send coordination messages, broadcast ownership, and narrate progress via speech.

tools.name: Scratchpad notes
tools.purpose: Persist structured notes across restarts without ad-hoc temp files.

tools.name: Test queue
tools.purpose: Queue, inspect, and retrieve daemon-managed test jobs when queued execution is required.

tools.name: Build queue
tools.purpose: Queue, inspect, and retrieve daemon-managed build jobs when queued execution is required.

tools.name: Operator choices
tools.purpose: Present explicit choices when a real operator decision is needed and record the selected option.

tools.name: Managed cron
tools.purpose: Run or inspect scheduled project tasks through Cacophony instead of system cron.

tools.name: Image generation
tools.purpose: Generate configured project images and avatars, optionally postprocess and commit them.
tools.sourceOfTruth: .cacophony/generation.yaml in projects that enable image presets

sections.name: Pi runtime and agent self-ops
sections.summary: Pi-native commands and skills that keep long-running managed agents healthy and recyclable.

tools.name: Pi recurring loop
tools.purpose: Schedule repeated prompts inside a Pi session for inbox checks, health sweeps, or reminders.

tools.name: Pi self-nudge
tools.purpose: Perform periodic health, inbox, and small follow-up checks without relying on daemon cron.

tools.name: Pi self-ops
tools.purpose: Rotate workers through beads with handoff notes, compaction, idle registration, and pool eligibility.

tools.name: Pi package entry points
tools.purpose: Install this repository as a Pi package that contributes prompt templates and extensions.

sections.name: Interactive and UI automation helpers
sections.summary: Tools for sessions that need a real terminal, screenshots, or desktop input automation.

tools.name: tmux-cli
tools.purpose: Launch a real TTY pane, send commands reliably, wait for idle output, capture the pane, and clean it up.

tools.name: Tendril MCP
tools.purpose: List windows, capture screenshots, send keyboard or mouse actions, and observe UI events.
tools.sourceOfTruth: Tendril MCP server and managed tendril profile

sections.name: Repo-local tools
sections.summary: Utilities provided directly by this repository and kept installable without project secrets.

tools.name: Live web search Pi extension
tools.purpose: Search the live web through GitHub Copilot Responses API and return grounded answers with citations.

tools.name: Tendril share Pi extension
tools.command: tendril_bridge_doctor, /tendril list, /tendril window <id-or-name>, /tendril display <id-or-name>, /tendril describe window <id-or-name>, /tendril stream window <id-or-name>
tools.audience: Pi users sharing local, remote, or WSL-tunnelled visual context with image-capable models
tools.purpose: Let the user inspect Tendril bridge settings, list Tendril targets, send captured window/display screenshots to image-capable models, send VLM-generated screenshot descriptions to the active model, or start a low-rate screenshot stream.
commonActions: diagnose configured Tendril command, remote target, and WSL tunnel
probe target discovery through the configured bridge
capture a window for the model
capture a display for the model
describe a screenshot with a vision model
look up targets by id or name
queue screenshot context as a follow-up while the agent is busy

tools.name: Kitty image preview Pi extension
tools.audience: Pi agents, operators using kitty-compatible terminals
tools.purpose: Display persistent terminal image previews from Pi using the kitty graphics protocol, with Tendril screenshot capture, series navigation, animation, tmux passthrough, Unicode placeholder anchoring, negative z-index direct placement, configurable widget placement, and fixed non-capturing right-side overlay placement.
commonActions: capture and show a Tendril screenshot
add a folder as an image series
hide or clear the preview widget

tools.name: Pi graphics theme + extension
tools.audience: Pi agents, operators using kitty-compatible terminals
tools.purpose: Ship a Nord-flavoured Pi theme (themes/kitty-graphics.json) paired with an extension that renders graphical UI affordances (gradient prompt enclosures, translucent message/code borders) through the kitty graphics protocol and Unicode placeholder placement, with scoped image ownership for safe cleanup.

tools.name: Firecracker VM Pi extension
tools.audience: Pi agents orchestrating Tendril-controllable VM workloads
tools.purpose: Prepare and lifecycle-manage Firecracker microVM workspaces with config files, API sockets, serial-console logs, Tendril manifests, and declared browser/VNC/noVNC service endpoints for visible screen access.

tools.name: App automation Pi extension
tools.command: app_automation_list, app_automation_doctor, app_automation_overview, app_automation_plan, app_automation_run, app_automation_open_bundle_run_once, app_automation_refresh_start, app_automation_refresh_bundle_start, app_automation_refresh_bundle_run_once, app_automation_refresh_staleness, app_automation_refresh_stale_run_once, app_automation_refresh_status, app_automation_refresh_stop, app_automation_snapshots_list, app_automation_snapshots_digest, app_automation_snapshot_links, app_automation_snapshots_staleness, app_automation_snapshots_cleanup_plan, app_automation_snapshot_read, app_automation_status, /tendril-app
tools.audience: Pi agents driving API-less web apps through blessed Playwright/Tendril workflows
tools.purpose: Expose a deterministic catalog and conservative runner for app automation plans covering Slack, Markdown canvas sync, Calendar, Outlook, and Teams before agents fall back to raw browser/UI automation; persisted snapshot links include freshness, sorting, app/kind counts, source context, and safe URL redaction.
commonActions: list blessed and local app configs
diagnose catalog, Playwright setup, and Tendril bridge routing
optionally probe Tendril target discovery from app_automation_doctor

summarize work-app refreshers and snapshots with optional overview link prefixed or bare query/kind/freshness filters, sorting, link limits, stale thresholds, and rendered aggregate matched/truncated/scanned counts across snapshot and app samples
dry-run or execute allowlisted runner steps
inspect canonical app automation state root

list/digest/query timestamped snapshot links with matched/truncated counts, freshness/app/kind counts, source context, exact-or-aliased kind filtering, optional newest/oldest/freshest/stalest sorting, and clear empty-filter output
use flexible /tendril-app links filters with optional app selector, explicit limits, and stale thresholds, such as fresh kind:events sort:newest stale-after:1440 limit:5 standup
arm, run once, inspect per-action staleness, or stale-refresh the standard Slack/Calendar/Outlook/Teams refresh bundle

tools.name: Web search prompt template
tools.purpose: Prompt template for web-search-assisted answers.

tools.name: web-search MCP server
tools.purpose: Expose web search as an MCP server packaged by the repository flake.

tools.name: Nix package collator
tools.purpose: Build the aggregate agent-utils package and expose repo tools as flake packages and apps.

tools.name: GitHub Pages inventory generator
tools.purpose: Regenerate this static Pages site from docs/tools.json and verify it remains publishable from /docs.
